evidence: "Love the old British mysteries and Margaret Rutherford was a fantastic Miss Marple."
"This slap-stick movie was very well cast and Crowe and Gosling were ideally suited."
"Love this series: perfectly cast; good writing and intricate plotting; good humor."
"Loved it. Denzel never disappoints and he determinedly kicked a** throughout."
"This is a laugh-out-loud bizarre cast of characters in a slap-stick kind of farce."
"Hanks always does a remarkable job as an actor and it was interesting finding out how little the public actually was aware of what transpired."
"Loved the movie and thought the casting was superb. Very entertaining."
"David Suchet is Poirot and Agatha Christie was one of the greatest mystery authors."
"Denzel never disappoints and he determinedly kicked a** throughout."
"Hitchcock always knew how to bring humor and suspense to the screen."
"Loved the first season and think the casting is superb."
"A good story, a true look at life, a plausible ending."
"It's really amazing that these productions are so great seeing that the time period is 75 to 100 years ago."

summary: The user enjoys a variety of genres, particularly comedy, drama, and mystery, with a strong preference for fast-paced narratives. They value high production quality and have a notable appreciation for well-cast performances, often highlighting emotional resonance in the stories they enjoy.
